{{Infobox religious building
| name = Itsumono Shrine (Q135040491)
| native_name = 出雲神社
| mapframe = yes
| mapframe-zoom = 15
| mapframe-wikidata = yes

| map_caption = Itsumono Shrine (Q135040491)

| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]
}}

{{nihongo|'''Itsumono Shrine'''|出雲神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Tanba Province]].

== instance of (P31) ==

* {{ill|Disputed Shikinaisha or Shikigeisha|lt=Disputed Shikinaisha or Shikigeisha|qid=Q135038714|1=Disputed Shikinaisha or Shikigeisha}}<ref>Kokugakuin University Shrine database</ref>
* {{ill|Q134917286|ltq=Q134917286|qid=Q134917286|1=Shikinaisha}}
* {{ill|Q845945|ltq=Q845945|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}}
* {{ill|Myojin Taisha|lt=Myōjin Taisha|en|Myojin Taisha|fr|Myōjin Taisha|ja|名神大社|simple|Myōjin Taisha|zh|名神大社|qid=Q9610964|1=Myōjin Taisha}}
* {{ill|Q135160342|ltq=Q135160342|qid=Q135160342|1=Kokuhei-sha}}

== part of (P361) ==

* {{ill|Q11368560|ltq=Q11368560|qid=Q11368560|1=List of Shikinaisha in Tanba Province}}
** Series ordinal: 1
** P155: {{ill|Q135040490|ltq=Q135040490|qid=Q135040490|1=Atsukushihikono Shrine}}
** P156: {{ill|Kuhatano Shrine|lt=Kuhatano Shrine|qid=Q135040492|1=Kuhatano Shrine}}
